sections.paragraph:
Original: דּכה

Transliteration: dâkâh

Phonetic: daw-kaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to crush, be crushed, be contrite, be broken
    1. (Qal) to be crushed, collapse
    2. (Niphal) to be crushed, be contrite, be broken
    3. (Piel)
      1. to crush down
      2. to crush to pieces

Origin: a primitive root (compare H1790, H1792)

TWOT entry: 428

Part(s) of speech: Verb
